evidence_records.raw_value: State Department press briefing: 'We are in active discussions but have not finalized any mineral rights agreement with Ukraine at this time.'
evidence_records.notes: Primary resolution source per market rules. No confirmation of any deal.

evidence_records.raw_value: Ukraine MFA official statement: 'No agreement regarding rare earth elements has been reached. Any reports suggesting otherwise are inaccurate.'
evidence_records.notes: Primary resolution source per market rules. Explicit denial.

evidence_records.raw_value: Reuters: 'White House officials reference a framework for cooperation, but no signed agreement exists. Ukraine has not acknowledged any deal involving rare earth minerals.'
evidence_records.notes: Tier-1 wire service. Reports 'framework' language but no official deal.

evidence_records.raw_value: AP: 'Ukrainian presidential office says there is no agreement to report regarding rare earth elements. Refers to ongoing consultations only.'
evidence_records.notes: Tier-1 wire service. Consistent with Ukraine MFA denial.

evidence_records.raw_value: Polymarket YES token resolved at $1.00. UMA governance vote: single whale cast 5M tokens (25% of total votes). Price surged from $0.09 to $1.00 in 24h prior to resolution.
evidence_records.notes: Market signal only. Suspected manipulation — UMA whale concentration. NOT a resolution source per market rules.
